item.title: YAML
item.author: seilylook
item.description: What is YAML? YAML is a programming language that is frequently combined with a wide range of other languages and is mostly used for creating configuration files. When creating configuration files for application projects, languages like Python and the Google-developed Flutter framework for Dart both use YAML (.yaml). Since it can be used to format containerized files, YAML is also well-liked among cloud engineers. Types Key - Value Pair 1 2 3 4 Fruit: Apple Vegetable: Carrot Liquid: Water Meat: Chicken Array | Lists 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 Fruits: - Orange - Apple - Banana Vegetables: - Carrot - Cauliflower - Tomato Dictionary | Map 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 Banana: Calories: 105 Fat: 0.
